title: ui-audit findings
description: The per-finding contract emitted by /ui-audit. findings.json is an array of Finding objects.

id.description: Stable per-element id = short hash(statePath + domPath). Merge key across passes.

selector.description: Machine-resolvable locator for the /implement handoff (data-* when present, else the document-order domPath). NOT a Playwright :text() string.

statePath.description: Structural state key (route + selector/type/path signature, text excluded) the element was found in.

screenshot.description: Relative path to the annotated/plain screenshot for this element's state.

expected.description: What a correct/real element would show or do.

observed.description: What was actually observed (the mechanism failure, for FAKE-OR-DEAD).

staticTrace.description: Code-path trace: element -> prop -> hook -> API -> DB, each as a file:line anchor or note.

dynamicEvidence.description: Live browser evidence bundle: provenance, network-on-mount, cross-source compare, effect proofs.

crossSource.description: displayed value compared against an independent source (DB/canonical endpoint)

visionEvidence.description: Pixel-level observation, paired with its required DOM-measurable corroborant.

models.description: Per-model verdict authorship + cross-family validation results.

repro.description: Ordered, human-followable steps to reproduce the finding.

suggestedOwner.description: Best-guess owning area/file for the /implement or /god-review handoff.
